selection_order.condition: governance entrypoints or governance evidence are missing or mismatched
selection_order.why: Governance Overlay is not fully landed, so refresh repo-level evidence and entrypoint wiring before promoting product work.

selection_order.condition: planning verifier or release-style preflight is red
selection_order.why: The repo-side gate floor is red; repair the failing gate before advancing the active queue.

selection_order.condition: governance overlay is green but Phase 1 prerequisite probes are not ready
selection_order.why: The governance floor is in place, but GPT-5.4 gateway or codex exec readiness is still pending.

selection_order.condition: governance overlay is green and Phase 1 prerequisite probes are ready
selection_order.why: Governance is green and the prerequisite probes are ready, so the repo can advance into real SDK execution work.

rollback_ref: git revert governance overlay docs, selector, preflight, and governed reference companion bundle
